gemstones.name: Steadfast Preparation
gemstones.description: If the wearer loses 20% or more of their MAX HP from a single attack, the next hit received will deal 20% less damage.

gemstones.name: Uncontrollable
gemstones.description: The wearer gains an additional 30 RES against enemies attempting to place <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs.

gemstones.name: Uncontrollable
gemstones.description: The wearer gains an additional 30 RES against enemies attempting to place <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuffs.
